creator: yongari@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Feedback timeout(> 15 months). 
fxp(4) received a lot of enhancesments including various locking fixes 
as well as bus_dma(9) cleanup since 6.2-RELEASE. If you still see the 
issue on recent FreeBSD release(8.1-RELEASE or 7.3-RELEASE), please 
open a new PR. 
Thanks.
